title: SRS Hospital Operating Twin Executive Release Standard
intent: Release only when the demo communicates one causal idea at a time, proves the operating impact, and remains presentation-safe across supported viewports.

releasePolicy.decision: Release only when every hard gate passes and all score thresholds are met. Weighted score cannot compensate for a failed gate.

measurementProtocol.viewportEvidence: Capture all 19 canonical states at every required viewport, plus one complete autoplay recording at the primary stage viewport.
measurementProtocol.performanceEvidence: Measure a production build on presentation-class hardware with browser zoom at 100 percent and no CPU throttling, then repeat once with a 4x CPU slowdown as a resilience check.
measurementProtocol.humanEvidence: Use evals/human-audience-scorecard.template.json immediately after an uninterrupted run; do not coach answers before recall questions.

hardGates.name: Canonical state contract
hardGates.requirement: The guided story implements exactly 19 canonical states in the specified order.

hardGates.name: One foreground proposition
hardGates.requirement: No state presents more than one foreground callout or competing primary message.

hardGates.name: No repeated surface
hardGates.requirement: A pressure revealed at the end of one cycle advances directly to the next AI materialization and is not surfaced again.

hardGates.name: Semantic alignment
hardGates.requirement: Callout, caption, dashboard focus, and camera focus describe the same pressure in every state.

hardGates.name: Claim integrity
hardGates.requirement: Every item labeled system constraint matches the model-selected constraint; pain points and operating friction are labeled distinctly.

hardGates.name: Atomic metric timing
hardGates.requirement: Metrics remain frozen through materialize and change once, on entry to resolve.

hardGates.name: Atomic camera timing
hardGates.requirement: The camera holds through resolve and moves once on reveal.

hardGates.name: Explicit visual state
hardGates.requirement: No callout is simultaneously materializing and resolved, and undefined lever metadata cannot create a materializing state.

hardGates.name: Protected regions never overlap
hardGates.requirement: Callouts, dashboard, controls, and captions have zero geometric overlap at every required viewport and canonical state.

hardGates.name: No overflow or clipping
hardGates.requirement: There is no horizontal overflow and no visible text clipping at any required viewport.

hardGates.name: Executive pacing
hardGates.requirement: The uninterrupted guided story runs between 235 and 245 seconds and each foreground animation settles before the next beat.

hardGates.name: Reduced-motion equivalence
hardGates.requirement: Reduced-motion mode communicates all 19 states without infinite motion or semantic loss.

hardGates.name: Presentation-safe rendering
hardGates.requirement: Animation and interaction meet all performance thresholds on presentation-class hardware.

hardGates.name: Operable without pointer
hardGates.requirement: All controls are keyboard reachable, visibly focused, correctly named, and at least 44 by 44 CSS pixels.

hardGates.name: Perceivable meaning
hardGates.requirement: Contrast meets WCAG AA and no story state relies on color or animation alone.

hardGates.name: Deterministic control
hardGates.requirement: Autoplay and manual stepping produce the same state sequence; pause, resume, replay, and reset never skip or double-commit a lever.

hardGates.name: Clean production run
hardGates.requirement: The production build completes with zero console errors and zero failed asset requests.

criteria.name: Each intervention visibly causes one operating change
Each reveal creates the logic for the next intervention
Pain point, constraint, and friction language remains precise
The final capacity decision feels inevitable
The active beat is understood within three seconds
The six-lever sequence can be accurately recalled
Cognitive load remains low without speaker rescue
The next executive decision is unambiguous
Hierarchy directs attention to one focal point
Hospital, callout, dashboard, and caption form one composition
Spacing, typography, and alignment are executive-grade
Responsive compositions preserve meaning and polish
Motion explains state change rather than decorating it
Pacing creates comprehension without drag
Camera and foreground transitions never compete
Ambient motion remains precise and unobtrusive
Before-after evidence is legible and credible
Model assumptions and illustrative status are clear
The demo changes an investment or operating-model decision
The live run is stable and presentation-safe
Keyboard and assistive semantics are complete
Reduced-motion and mobile experiences preserve the story
Performance stays within release thresholds
